notifications.desktop_title: Ol alert blong Windows mo komputa
notifications.desktop_hint: Soem toast taem i gat niu wok o apdet blong submisen (brauza i mas opn).
notifications.desktop_denied_hint: Ol notifikesen i blok. Alawem long seting blong saet long brauza.
notifications.desktop_unsupported: Desktop notifikesen i no wok long brauza ia.

secretariat.meetings_subtitle: Skejul mo manej ol mitin blong Public Service Commission.
secretariat.sitting_title_placeholder: eg. « Namba 8 Odineri Mitin blong Komisin »
secretariat.notes_placeholder: Eni not we yu wantem ad bifo mitin ia…
secretariat.search_meetings_placeholder: Faenem wetem refrens, taetol no ples…
secretariat.failed_load_meetings: Sistem i no save lodem ol mitin.
secretariat.failed_schedule: Sistem i no save skejul mitin.
secretariat.failed_update_status: Sistem i no save apdetim stat.
secretariat.agenda_subtitle: Manej ol aetem long ajenda blong evri mitin.
secretariat.no_meetings_scheduled: I no gat eni mitin we i skejul
secretariat.no_agenda_items: I no gat eni aetem long ajenda blong mitin ia yet.
secretariat.no_submissions_ready: I no gat eni submisen we i redi blong komisin
secretariat.submissions_filter_hint: Ol submisen we i stap long stej « Forwarded to Commission » nomo i save soem.
secretariat.agenda_removed: Aetem i rabe aot long ajenda.
secretariat.agenda_add_failed: Sistem i no save ad aetem.
secretariat.agenda_remove_failed: Sistem i no save rabe aot aetem.
secretariat.remove_agenda_message: Yu wantem rabe aot aetem ia long ajenda? Yu no save andu hem bakegen.
secretariat.failed_load_data: Sistem i no save lodem data.
secretariat.minutes_subtitle: Raetem, riviu mo saenem ofisel minit blong evri mitin.
secretariat.minutes_search_placeholder: Lukluk long ref o titel blong mitin…
secretariat.minutes_load_failed: Sistem i no save lodem ol minit.
secretariat.minutes_empty: No gat minit yet. Open wan mitin blong stat.
secretariat.minutes_no_matches: No gat minit i matj wetem filta.
secretariat.decisions_subtitle: Ofisiol rekod blong ol desisen we Komisin i mekem long evri mitin.
secretariat.search_decisions_placeholder: Faenem wetem refrens, taetol no ministri…
secretariat.no_decisions_match: I no gat eni desisen we i fit long filta.
secretariat.tasks_subtitle: Trakem ol wok blong implimentesen we i asaen long ol OPSC manija mo ofisia afta desisen.
secretariat.notifications_subtitle: Ol alat blong sistem, rimaenda blong det blong finis mo apdet blong wok.

reports.title: Ripot blong Eksekiutiv
reports.subtitle: Dasbod blong Pefomans mo Akaontabiliti blong Sistem
reports.total_register_sub: Olgeta submisen we i rekod stat long bigining
reports.overdue_assessments: Ol Asesmen We I Pas Taem
reports.avg_turnaround_sub: Stat long risivim go kasem desisen
reports.live_notice: Ripot ia hem i kam long laev data blong rejista blong Public Service Commission. Visibiliti i blong rol blong yu nomo.

dashboard.activity_overview: Lukluk Long Aktiviti blong Ol Submisen
dashboard.activity_overview_sub: Ol submisen we mifala i risivim mo desisin we mifala i mekem long peria we yu jusum
dashboard.completion_rate_sub: Ol kes we i finis kompea long olgeta we mifala i risivim
dashboard.active_cases: Ol Kes We I Stap Goan
dashboard.all_submissions_sub: Olgeta kes we mifala i rejistarem stat long bigining
dashboard.pipeline_sub: Risivim, desisen mo taget — vyu blong manis
dashboard.weekly_intake_sub: Ol niu submisen vs ol kes we i submitim bakegen long wik ia
dashboard.no_ministry_breakdown: I no gat eni brekdaon blong ministri kasem we i gat ol submisen.
dashboard.subject: Sabjek
dashboard.stat_active_sub: 12 we i muv aot long wik ia
dashboard.seed_banner_title: I no gat eni submisen long databes yet.
dashboard.seed_banner_hint: Long backend direktori ronem {{seed}}, no startem bakegen Docker {{backend}} sevis wetem {{flag}} (defolt) blong sistem i save mekem ol mok kes atomatik.

submission.title: Taetol
submission.no_submissions: I no gat eni submisen yet
submission.list_subtitle: Faenem mo openem ol submisen we yu yu save lukluk long olgeta. Fomat blong refrens PSC-YYYY-#####.
submission.new_submission_hint: Sistem i save givim refrens PSC-YYYY-##### atomatik taem yu sevem.
submission.filter_placeholder: Filta wetem refrens, taetol, ministri no stej…
submission.no_matches: I no gat eni submisen we i fit long filta blong yu.
submission.empty_state_title: API i no givim eni submisen long akaon blong yu.
submission.empty_state_hint: Sapos yu wantem demo data: long fold blong {{backend}} ronem {{seed}}, no startem bakegen Docker {{backend}} sevis (hem i ronem sid taem {{flag}}).
submission.load_error_default: Sistem i no save lodem ol submisen.
submission.ai_brief_subtitle: Samari we AI i jeneret — yu no nid long riviu evri dokumen.
submission.ai_brief_empty: Brief i no save jeneret. Jekem ANTHROPIC_API_KEY mo trae gen.
submission.ai_brief_timeout: Brief i tekem taem tumas. Jekem Celery worker mo ANTHROPIC_API_KEY long .env, mo klik Regenerate.
submission.quality_subtitle: AI blong ol reviewer — skor ia i save soem hao mo wok blong jekem bifo assessment.

staff_chat.title: Staff Assistant
staff_chat.subtitle: Askem long ol proses PSC, form, mo status blong submisen
staff_chat.welcome_short: Askem long proses, form, o status (e.g. PSC-2026-00042).
staff_chat.error_send: I no save sendem mesij. Traem bakegen.

stage.minutes_drafted_signed: Minit I Raetem mo I Saenem
stage.decision_entered_assigned: Desisen I Raetem mo I Asaen

meeting_room.back_hub: Go bak long rum blong mitin
meeting_room.hub_subtitle: Rekodem, Logitech GROUP, mo wok blong ol minit long Bislama
meeting_room.hub_intro: Ol mitin long rum mas yusum conference audio (push-to-talk mic o Logitech GROUP) olgeta i go long wan feed long Zoom/Teams. Uplod rekodem, pastem riviu teks bifo Chair i saenem minit.
meeting_room.hub_delegate_title: Ol mitin we i strong: wan man nomo i toktok
meeting_room.hub_delegate_body: Taem plante Komisiona i toktok wantaim long wan mic, rekodem i bagarap — ASR mo Claude i no save riviu. Push-to-talk mic (evri man i pres bifo toktok) i mekem wan klia voice long track.
meeting_room.hub_linked_meeting: Mitin #{{id}} — ol link i gat id blong mitin.
meeting_room.hub_card_logitech_desc: Setup: USB, Windows, Zoom/Teams, expansion mic.
meeting_room.hub_card_pipeline_desc: Zoom ASR mo Claude long mitin long Bislama.
meeting_room.hub_card_capture_desc: Uplod file blong Zoom o rekodem long browser (ekssepsten).
meeting_room.hub_test_note_body: Skedul mitin → uplod → paste transcript → kopi prompt → jeneret minit.
meeting_room.logitech_subtitle: Mas yusum long ol mitin blong Komisin long rum
meeting_room.logitech_policy: No yusum mic blong laptop, tablet, o telefon. Yusum push-to-talk conference mic (long ful Komisin) o Logitech GROUP — wan feed nomo long Zoom long PC blong rum.
meeting_room.logitech_step_usb_body: Plug Logitech GROUP long PC blong rum.
meeting_room.logitech_step_forbid_body: Laptop, tablet, mo telefon mic i no permitted.
meeting_room.logitech_step_forbid_tip_1: Klos lid laptop sapos i gat mic.
meeting_room.logitech_step_forbid_tip_2: No rekodem long telefon blong yu.
meeting_room.logitech_step_windows_body: Mekem Logitech GROUP default mic long Windows.
meeting_room.logitech_step_zoom_body: Selekt Logitech GROUP long Zoom o Teams.
meeting_room.logitech_step_expansion_body: Konek expansion mic long big rum.
meeting_room.logitech_step_expansion_tip_2: Putim mic long we ol Komisiona i stap.
meeting_room.logitech_step_record_body: Stat cloud rekodem long Zoom/Teams. Afta mitin, eksport mo uplod long app.
meeting_room.logitech_step_record_tip_1: Luk rekodem indicator bifo stat wok.
meeting_room.logitech_step_record_tip_2: Uplod long Meeting room → Uplod rekodem.
meeting_room.pipeline_subtitle: Zoom ASR → Claude → minit we Chair i saenem
meeting_room.pipeline_why_title: Taem Zoom mo Claude i mas wok wantaim
meeting_room.pipeline_why_claude: Claude i text model nomo. Hem i no save lisin long MP3 o M4A rekodem blong rum mo taemap — hem i nidim teks.
meeting_room.pipeline_why_zoom: Zoom (o Teams) i save lisin long audio, be transcription automatic i no save Bislama. Teks we hem i putum i bagarap oltaem.
meeting_room.pipeline_sequential_intro: Bae yu yusum tufala tool long row ia:
meeting_room.pipeline_flow_audio: [ Audio blong rum — rekodem Logitech GROUP ]
meeting_room.pipeline_flow_zoom: Zoom transcriber — lisin long audio, putum teks phonetic we i bagarap
meeting_room.pipeline_flow_copy: Kopi teks we i bagarap long Zoom
meeting_room.pipeline_flow_claude: Paste long Claude — riviu pattern blong Bislama mo raetem minit long Inglis
meeting_room.pipeline_zoom_desc: Speech-to-text. I no save Bislama — teks i bagarap.
meeting_room.pipeline_claude_desc: Riviu teks i go long Inglis minit. I no lisin long audio.
meeting_room.pipeline_record_desc: Rekodem + minit we Chair i saenem long app.
meeting_room.pipeline_example_spoken: Yumi mas leftemap ol Principal i go long Manager fastem.
meeting_room.pipeline_example_zoom: You me mass left em up all principal he go long manager fast time.
meeting_room.pipeline_example_final: Komisin i deside bae ol Principal Officers i go long Manager tier long fos fes blong restructure.
meeting_room.pipeline_warning: ASR i save bagarap Bislama. Secretariat i mas riviu bifo Chair i saen.
meeting_room.pipeline_step_2: Paste transcript Zoom o run AI transcribe.
meeting_room.capture_subtitle: Uplod file blong Zoom/Teams (rekomended) o browser (ekssepsten)
meeting_room.capture_policy_body: Yusum push-to-talk conference mic (ful sittings) o Logitech GROUP — no laptop/telefon. PC blong rum i sendem wan klia feed long Zoom; uplod eksport long app.
meeting_room.pipeline_delegate_title: Taem push-to-talk conference mic i impoten
meeting_room.pipeline_overlap_problem: Long strong toktok (olsem VBS restructure we i blok), plante man i toktok wantaim. Tri voice long wan mic i bagarap rekodem — Zoom mo Claude i no save separat.
meeting_room.pipeline_delegate_solution: Ol conference mic wetem pres-buton i helpem man i wet. Wan mic nomo i live — ol interrupt i daon.
meeting_room.pipeline_delegate_result: Rekodem i gat wan klia speaker long wan taem — Zoom i save kapturem ol word. Bislama i still nidim Claude, be audio i no bagarap long fes.
meeting_room.capture_upload_recommended: Rekomended: uplod rekodem long PC blong rum
meeting_room.capture_upload_hint: Eksport blong Zoom, Teams, o lokal file.
meeting_room.capture_file_selected: File i redi — riviu o delete.
meeting_room.capture_device_blocked: Built-in o telefon mic i no permitted. Selekt Logitech GROUP.
meeting_room.capture_file_size_error: File i big tumas (500 MB max).
meeting_room.capture_browser_gate: Browser rekodem nomo long remote/ekssepsten. Ofisal mitin mas uplod Zoom/Teams export.
meeting_room.capture_browser_confirm: Mi konfem hem i remote / ekssepsten rekodem
meeting_room.capture_upload_next: Next: paste transcript Zoom o open minit editor.
meeting_room.minutes_bislama_warning: ASR i save bagarap Bislama — riviu gud bifo Chair i saen.

auth.inactivity_logout: Sistem i lokaut yu from yu no muvum eni samting. Plis sain in bakegen.
auth.inactivity_locked_hint: Skrin i lok from yu no muv. Raetem PIN blong sesen blong kontiniu.
auth.invalid_credentials: Nem blong yusa no paswod i rong
auth.approve_push: Apruv pus notifikesen long telefon blong yu

feedback.title: Sanem Fidbak
feedback.subject: Sabjek
feedback.submitted: Tank yu — mifala i risivim fidbak blong yu.

account.inactivity_lock_desc: Taem yu no muv mouse o kiibod, skrin i lok. Raetem PIN — yu stap insaed long sistem.
account.inactivity_lock_saved: Skrin bae i lok afta {{count}} minit blong no aktiviti.
account.inactivity_lock_pin_required: Setem PIN blong sesen fast — sapos nogat, yu no save openem skrin.

lock.title: Sesen i lok
lock.subtitle: Raetem PIN blong yu blong stat bakegen.
lock.subtitle_inactivity: Sesen i lok. Raetem PIN blong kontiniu wok.
lock.subtitle_no_pin: Sesen i lok. Setem PIN long Account, o sain aot mo sain in bakegen.

register_report.ai_subtitle: Tokbaot wan ripot long plain language. SCDMS bae filtaem register, raetem samari, mo mekem PDF mo HTML blong download.
register_report.prompt_placeholder: e.g. Ol overdue decision blong ODU wetem implementation status…
register_report.prompt_required: Plis tokbaot wan ripot yu wantem.
register_report.filters_hint: Ol filta blong date/status/manager i go wetem request blong yu.

pwa.offline_banner: Yu no gat net. Sam pej i save lod from kash, be data blong laev i nid net.
pwa.update_body: Niu vesen blong SCDMS i redi. Reload blong karem ol niu fix mo faetja.
pwa.install_body: Putum app long hom skrin blong yu blong opnem kwik, olsem wan app.

accessibility.current_page: pej yu stap long hem naoia
